summary: Iteration 171 - Navigation Swap & Personalization Testing COMPLETE. All TopNav and BottomNav restructure features verified. TopNav: Map (yellow) → Passport (emerald) → Dynamic Persona (Stoked/Zap for Comp Surfer) → Search → Notifications (badge=3) → Settings. BottomNav: Home → Explore → Create → Messages → Me. All navigation and modal interactions working correctly.

minor.issue: 404 errors in console - bookings endpoint returning 404 (pre-existing issue from iteration 170)

critical_code_review_comments: TopNav restructure correctly implemented: Map-first with Passport and Dynamic Persona Icon
Dynamic Persona Icon correctly shows Stoked (Zap) for Comp Surfer role
Passport modal opens correctly with Level, My Stamps, Leaderboard tabs
Sessions Hub drawer opens correctly from Persona icon click
BottomNav Messages tab correctly moved from TopNav for thumb-zone accessibility
context_for_next_testing_agent: Navigation swap fully implemented and verified. TopNav: Map → Passport → Persona → Search → Notifications → Settings. BottomNav: Home → Explore → Create → Messages → Me. User dpritzker0905@gmail.com has Comp Surfer role showing Stoked (Zap) persona icon.
